full_text:
Han Yao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Yao. Served Wei. Second of Han De’s four sons. Died at Changshan facing Zhao Yun. Han Yao is a fictional character. Han Yao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Han Yao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
